name: trinuc_CAG_100bp
description: (CAG)n trinucleotide expansion, 100 bp total (33 copies). HD-like: Huntington/SCA-relevant polyglutamine repeat. Forms hairpins; common in 35+ Mendelian repeat disorders. Stresses mapper handling of pathogenic short tandem repeats.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
